title: prunus virginiana subsp. demissa
intro: Prunus virginiana subsp. demissa, also known as the chokeberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The health benefits of chokeberry include its potential to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant support. Chokeberry can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in jams and preserves due to its sweet-tart flavor.
